title: Jewellery Pliers - Reastar 3 PCS Pliers for Jewellery Making, Jewelry Making Tools with Jump Ring Opener - for Jewelry Beading Cutting Wrapping and DIY Craft Supplies
features: 【PACKAGE INCLUDE】Jewellery making tools comes with 3 pack jewellery pliers and a jump ring opener. Our pliers set includes needle nose pliers/chain nose pliers, wire cutters and round nosed pliers (the 3 most popular and useful). So you don't need to worry about finding specialist tools.

【📢PLEASE NOTE】If the jewellery making pliers you received have some oil on the head that make it look like dirty, please do not worry. These are coated with oil to prevent rust. Please wipe them clean with a cloth before use and apply oil to them before storage, which will help the pliers keep anti-rust.

【COLOURFUL RUBBER HANDLES】Our jewellery pliers designed with different colored rubber-coated handles for the sake of distinction and comfortable use. This ergonomic design not only contributes to your overall comfort, but also makes it easier on your hands when you have to tackle those tough jobs that are hard to reach.

【SUIT FOR JEWELRY MAKING AND REPAIR】The jewellery pliers with smooth polished surface that are designed for jewellery making and repair. No worry about scratch or leave marks on your jewellery. The jewellery making tools are perfect for many jewellery projects like making earrings, making bracelets, repair necklaces, making lanyards and other jewellery related projects.
【THE PERFECT GIFT】This jewellery pliers kit includes the tools needed to repair earrings, necklaces, beads and bracelets. This is the perfect gift for DIY lovers and craft lovers.
description: Product Description How to Maintain Jewellery Pliers? Before: Look dirty due to oiled surface. After: Look clean and shiny after wiping. It may look dirty due to oiled surface, please don't worry about it. Just wipe the surface of the jewellery plier with a cloth. You can oil the surface after use to better preserve it.
